productName: Stingers - 2pk .5g Liquid Diamonds Pre-Rolls - Jesse's Girl - 1g
description: A indica infused joint built on Jessie's Girl and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — earthy, sweet undertones, delivering a slow, mellow wind-down vibe. Pace yourself.
